articles.title: Expanded SBA Fraud Push and New Alliances Might Change The Case For Investing In Palantir Technologies (PLTR)
articles.summary: In early July 2026, the U.S. Small Business Administration said it is expanding use of Palantir Technologies’ software to power a nationwide fraud detection push across pandemic-era relief programs, while new commercial alliances with Rackspace, SNP SE, and GNP Seguros extend Palantir’s AI platforms into regulated and SAP-centric environments. Together these moves show Palantir’s tools becoming embedded as core infrastructure for secure, governed AI across government, insurance, healthcare,...
